item.hook: ⚡ 15% of Americans say they'd be willing to work for an AI boss, according to new poll
item.title: 15% of Americans say they'd be willing to work for an AI boss, according to new poll
item.summary: According to a Quinnipiac University poll, 15% of Americans say they'd be willing to have a job where their direct supervisor was an AI program that assigned tasks and set schedules.
